name: io.github.Perseus-Computing-LLC/perseus
title: Perseus — MCP Server + Live Context Engine
description: MCP server with 26 tools for live workspace state resolution. Pre-resolves git status, service health, file queries, memory federation, and multi-agent coordination into markdown before the AI sees it. LOCAL FTS5 memory for fast project recall; EXTERNAL Mimir persistent memory for cross-session facts. Read-only context engine, single-file Python (pyyaml only), MIT. Serves over stdio and SSE.
